title: 8-to-3 Priority Encoder Functional Diagram
description: A visual representation of an 8-input priority encoder showing how it encodes the highest-priority active input into a 3-bit binary output, including an enable input and valid output indicator.
elements: 8 Input Lines (D0-D7, D7 is highest priority)
relationships: Input signals pass through priority logic which determines the highest active input
The enable input (EN) gates the encoder operation
The 3 output lines (Y2-Y0) display the binary code of the highest active input
The valid output (V) indicates when at least one input is active
